description: Style NoteAdd a pop of colour to your Summer wear wardrobe with this kurti from myntra. Featuring a colourful, all over floral print and made from pure cotton this piece scores high on style as well as comfort. Accessorise it with beaded bracelets and strappy wedge heels for an effortless yet inspired look.Product DetailsOrange floral and paisley printed kurti, round neck with pink top stitched patch, short self placket with fabric buttons, short sleeves, vented hemMaterials and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model( height 5'8" and chest 33) is wearing a size M
